use_codes.desc: INDUCTION OF REMISSION IN PATIENTS WITH ACTIVE, MILD TO MODERATE ULCERATIVE COLITIS

indications.text:
UCERIS® extended-release tablets are indicated for the induction of remission in patients with active, mild to moderate
ulcerative colitis.

UCERIS (budesonide) extended release tablets are indicated for the induction of remission in
patients with active, mild to moderate ulcerative colitis.

UCERIS® extended-release tablets are indicated for the induction of remission in patients with active, mild to moderate
ulcerative colitis.
